instruction: Set python and pip defaults for this user so that `python` runs Python 3 and `pip` points to pip3, without removing system binaries. Then create ~/Desktop/python_default_report.txt with two lines: python=python3 and pip=pip3.

result.command:
ok=1; pyv=$(python --version 2>&1); pipv=$(pip --version 2>&1); echo "$pyv" | grep -q '^Python 3\.' || ok=0; echo "$pipv" | grep -q 'python 3' || ok=0; expected=$(cat <<'EOF'
python=python3
pip=pip3
EOF
); actual=$(cat ~/Desktop/python_default_report.txt 2>/dev/null); [ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || ok=0; if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
